body: BEGIN INSERT INTO t VALUES (1); END

comment: UPDATE with WHERE (inner = must not be read as assignment)
body: BEGIN UPDATE t SET c = 1 WHERE id = 2; END
BEGIN SELECT (SELECT max(id) FROM u) FROM t; END

comment: bare function call as a statement
assignment still parses (not mis-read as execsql)
compound target whose field is a SQL keyword (matches PG: still an assignment)
compound target whose field is an unreserved PL/pgSQL keyword
param compound target (PARAM assembles like IDENT, matching PG)

body: BEGIN x := (SELECT count(*) FROM t); END
BEGIN IF x > 0 THEN INSERT INTO t VALUES (x); END IF; END

comment: execsql and assignment together in a loop
body: BEGIN LOOP SELECT 1; x := x + 1; EXIT WHEN x > 3; END LOOP; END
